items.title: SwitchBot’s acquisition of Nanoleaf is about more than lighting
items.summary: Smart lighting company Nanoleaf has been acquired by OneRobotics, the parent company of SwitchBot. In an exclusive interview with The Verge, Nanoleaf CEO Gimmy Chu says the company will remain indepen…
